content: Le cellule sono città multimolecolari cibernetiche, piene di macchine hi-tech, centrali elettriche e persino nanorobot.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Cells are cybernetic multimolecular cities, full of hi-tech machines, power plants, and even nanorobots
